name: ant
description: (ant) dual Claude Code and Codex skills: create application intake, implementation orchestration, frontend best practices, Laravel best practices, GitLab delivery workflows, Google Docs, and Asana task analysis.

interface.shortDescription: Shared (ant) skills for Codex and Claude Code.
interface.longDescription: (ant) umbrella skills for new application intake, implementation orchestration, frontend quality, Laravel architecture/performance/caching, GitLab MR/conflict delivery workflows, Google Docs, and Asana task analysis.
defaultPrompt: Use the relevant (ant) skill for this task.
For new applications, use create-application to clarify the app shape and hand off to orchestration.
For implementation work, use implementation-orchestrator from brainstorming through verification.
For frontend, Laravel, or delivery work, prefer the umbrella best-practices/workflow skill and load only relevant references.
